title: SQL
description: A complete path through SQL: database and relational foundations, data types, querying, filtering, functions, aggregation, joins, subqueries and CTEs, set operations, DML and DDL, constraints, views, indexes, transactions and concurrency, window functions, advanced querying, procedural SQL, semi-structured data, database design and normalization, performance tuning, security, administration, distributed and analytical SQL, dialects and the modern SQL ecosystem (through SQL:2023).
